item.title: The "X-Men" in Sengoku Japan [by Lucas Pereira]
item.description:
Psylocke I'm sure this art set will be great for users like me who've been busy watching "SHOGUN" and "X-MEN '97" Artist Source: https://www.instagram.com/lucaspereiraart/
Wolverine
Storm
Gambit
Rogue

The Blob

item.title: POV you're taking your cosplay gf out for dinner - YuzuPyon
item.description: Hi everyone hope you like my handmade Irulan chainmail dress cosplay ? I'll be posting a full tutorial video on how I made it on my Youtube Channel if you're interested in seeing the process feel free to follow my account to not miss future videos : https://youtube.com/@yuzupyon Pics of my Irulan cosplay in the desert : https://www.instagram.com/p/C59BBbnPf-4/ Have a great day everyone! -YuzuPyon
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: Images of Note: I died once.
item.description:
Two of them
smol
The rich want to outlaw street sleeping, keep rents high and keep shelter beds as low as possible because through the threat of state violence they can keep poor in line.
The only thing hustle culture serves is the very rich as they live off your work. If it was up to them, you would be working even longer for less.
Stardew Valley
Glasgow is a special place.
!
When we first got Eric, I failed to mention he was a cat to see how long it would take before people realized he was a cat.
lol
Drip, to be honest
O-O
Vincent out here fighting the good fight.
owo
Stardew Polyamory mod
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also Streeeeeeeeeeam: http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii
